files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
note: Adding batch_size param to Option class: touches Option.__init__ (new param + validation: only valid with multiple=True, ValueError if negative), Option.to_info_dict (add batch_size key, always included), and Parameter.type_cast_value (multiple=True branch, to yield tuples of batch_size instead of one big tuple when batch_size is set). types.py changes likely minor/TBD.
